description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, clad in light gray horizontal siding and featuring a prominent stone chimney on one side. The house has a moderately pitched gable roof and a mix of single and double-hung windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The front entryway is simple, with a single door and a small overhang, flanked by two mature trees and a patch of greenery. On the rear side, there is a fenced backyard with a freeform swimming pool surrounded by a paved patio area. The house sits on a green lawn base, and the backyard is enclosed by a light-colored fence for privacy. The overall design is practical and typical of mid-20th-century American suburban homes.
description: A two-story, light gray suburban house with a gable roof, stone chimney, and fenced backyard featuring a swimming pool. The exterior includes mature trees, asymmetrical windows, and a simple front entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two large trees, and a patch of greenery along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, the stone chimney, and the start of the fenced backyard with the pool visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, freeform swimming pool, and multiple windows overlooking the patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stone chimney, more of the green lawn, and the side of the house with additional windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with a small overhang, no porch, flanked by mature trees and minimal decorative elements.
